event: Used 0.25–0.5 MAC isoflurane as sole sedative
Absent motor response to painful stimulus
GSM refractory to three antiepileptic medications
Electroencephalography showed generalised periodic discharges with no discernable background rhythm
SSEP unhelpful due to myoclonus motion artefacts
Brain MRI showed bilateral basal ganglia and frontoparietal cortex infarction consistent with severe hypoxic encephalopathy
Died in 24 h with comfort measures
